name: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Airflow Window White Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - Tempered Glass Side Panel - 2x Preinstalled Pure Wings 3 140mm PWM fans - Rotatable PCIe Slots - USB 3.2 Gen. 2 Type-C (BGW75)
shortName: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Airflow Window White Mid-Tower ATX Computer
description: A mid-tower ATX case with white tempered glass side panel and pre-installed PWM fans, offering rotatable PCIe slots for modern builds.
